arts.ttl: Gary Neville warns Gareth Southgate about major issue he'd face as new Man Utd manager
arts.sum: Manchester United icon Gary Neville has spoken out on the links between his former club and ex-England boss Gareth Southgate as speculation over Erik ten Hag's future grows

arts.ttl: £70m wiped off Man United share price amid Erik ten Hag uncertainty
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag is under increasing scrutiny both on and off the field following the defeat to Tottenham Hotspur at the weekend

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Porto
arts.sum: CB: Lisandro Martinez - Ten Hag might want to consider managing Martinez's minutes given his recent injury history, but the manager hasn't really got a choice but to start the Argentine again in midweek. Man Utd were frustratingly held by FC Twente in their Europa League league phase opener last week, so they need the points not merely for Ten Hag's future but to ignite their continental campaign.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag press conference live Manchester United team news for Porto Europa League fixture
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag will speak to the media in Portugal ahead of Man United's match against FC Porto.

arts.ttl: Man United squad revealed: Is Kobbie Mainoo included for Porto trip?
arts.sum: Manchester United are given a huge fitness boost for Thursday's Europa League contest against Porto, with Kobbie Mainoo in the squad.

arts.ttl: Everton send Manchester United fresh Jarrad Branthwaite message amid Liverpool transfer truth
arts.sum: Manchester United saw two bids rejected for Everton star Branthwaite and might have their work cut out should they wish to go again in January.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag accused of 'wasting' Cristiano Ronaldo by former Man Utd accomplice
arts.sum: Former Manchester United assistant coach Benni McCarthy believes manager Erik ten Hag "wasted" Cristiano Ronaldo during the forward's second stint at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: When Tyrell Malacia could make his Manchester United return after 16-month absence
arts.sum: Man Utd defender Tyrell Malacia is making positive strides as he looks to return from a long spell on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: ‘All of a sudden’: Emmanuel Petit says ‘fantastic’ Manchester United player even looks unhappy now
arts.sum: It’s been a miserable 12 months at Manchester United to say the least. The FA Cup win aside, the football has been drab, results have...

arts.ttl: Ten Hag Leaves Out 250k p/w Star as 20 y/o Included in Man Utd Squad for Porto
arts.sum: Manchester United have just released their squad to face Porto on Thursday, with Mason Mount not included.
